current_status.title: Current Status
current_status.free_agent_hint: You don't have an active contract with any club.

pending.title: Pending Offers
pending.empty_hint: When a club sends an offer, it'll show up here.

dialog.desc_accept: You'll sign a contract with {{club}} for {{salary}}/week over {{months}} months. All other offers will be automatically rejected.
dialog.desc_reject: Are you sure you want to reject the offer from {{club}}?

notifications.sold_body: {{name}} sold for {{amount}}. Credited to club finances.

toast.signed: Contract signed! You're now part of {{club}}.
toast.rejected: Offer rejected: The offer was rejected successfully.
